cli.diagnose_missing_config.stdout: {"error": {"code": "PAYGATE_CONFIG_INVALID", "message": "Config file not found at /missing. Create a Paygate YAML config or pass the correct path."}, "ok": false}

cli.help.stdout:
Usage: root [OPTIONS] [COMMAND] [ARGS]...                                      
                                                                                
 Paygate command-line client.                                                   
                                                                                
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --version                     Show the installed paygate-client version.     │
│ --install-completion          Install completion for the current shell.      │
│ --show-completion             Show completion for the current shell, to copy │
│                               it or customize the installation.              │
│ --help                        Show this message and exit.                    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Commands ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ request      Send an HTTP request and satisfy a Paygate 402 challenge when   │
│              required.                                                       │
│ backend      Diagnose payer backend integrations.                            │
│ credentials  Inspect and purge cached payment credentials.                   │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
